---
title: "Data Cleaning Steps (Schools and Brownfields)"
author: "Sohil Malik"
date: "2025-10-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# Public School Data Cleaning 
# -------------------------------

# Load public school CSV
public_school_2324 <- read.csv(
  "Data/Schools/Public/ELSI_csv_export_6390341940620748533721/ELSI_csv_export_6390341940620748533721.csv",
  skip = 6,
  header = TRUE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Specify numeric and character columns
cols_to_numeric <- c(
  "Total.Students.All.Grades..Includes.AE...Public.School..2023.24",
  "Free.and.Reduced.Lunch.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "Black.or.African.American.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "Hispanic.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "American.Indian.Alaska.Native.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "Nat..Hawaiian.or.Other.Pacific.Isl..Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "Asian.or.Asian.Pacific.Islander.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "White.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  "Full.Time.Equivalent..FTE..Teachers..Public.School..2023.24"
)

cols_to_character <- c(
  "School.ID..12.digit....NCES.Assigned..Public.School..Latest.available.year",
  "Agency.ID...NCES.Assigned..Public.School..Latest.available.year"
)

# Convert column types
public_school_2324[cols_to_character] <- 
  lapply(public_school_2324[cols_to_character], as.character)

public_school_2324[cols_to_numeric] <- 
  lapply(public_school_2324[cols_to_numeric], function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))

# Rename columns and trim whitespace
new_public_names <- c(
  School_Name = "School.Name",
  State_Name_Latest = "State.Name..Public.School..Latest.available.year",
  State_Name_2023_24 = "State.Name..Public.School..2023.24",
  STATE = "State.Abbr..Public.School..Latest.available.year",
  School_Name_2023_24 = "School.Name..Public.School..2023.24",
  School_ID = "School.ID..12.digit....NCES.Assigned..Public.School..Latest.available.year",
  Agency_ID = "Agency.ID...NCES.Assigned..Public.School..Latest.available.year",
  County_Name_2023_24 = "County.Name..Public.School..2023.24",
  FIPS_State_Code = "ANSI.FIPS.State.Code..Public.School..Latest.available.year",
  Locale = "Locale..Public.School..2023.24",
  Latitude = "Latitude..Public.School..2023.24",
  Longitude = "Longitude..Public.School..2023.24",
  Virtual_School_Status_2023_24 = "Virtual.School.Status..SY.2016.17.onward...Public.School..2023.24",
  Total_Students_Public_2023_24 = "Total.Students.All.Grades..Includes.AE...Public.School..2023.24",
  FRL_Students_Public_2023_24 = "Free.and.Reduced.Lunch.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  Black_Students_Public_2023_24 = "Black.or.African.American.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24 = "Hispanic.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  Native_Students_Public_2023_24 = "American.Indian.Alaska.Native.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24 = "Nat..Hawaiian.or.Other.Pacific.Isl..Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  Asian_Students_Public_2023_24 = "Asian.or.Asian.Pacific.Islander.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  White_Students_Public_2023_24 = "White.Students..Public.School..2023.24",
  FTE_Teachers_Public_2023_24 = "Full.Time.Equivalent..FTE..Teachers..Public.School..2023.24"
)

public_school_2324 <- public_school_2324 %>% rename(!!!new_public_names)

public_school_2324 <- public_school_2324 %>%
  mutate(
    STATE = str_trim(STATE),
    State_Name_Latest = str_trim(State_Name_Latest),
    State_Name_2023_24 = str_trim(State_Name_2023_24)
  )

# Standardize IDs and compute demographic proportions
public_school_2324 <- public_school_2324 %>%
  mutate(
    School_ID = str_pad(as.character(School_ID), width = 12, side = "left", pad = "0"),

    prop_frl = if_else(
      !is.na(FRL_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * FRL_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    ),

    prop_black = if_else(
      !is.na(Black_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * Black_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    ),

    prop_hispanic = if_else(
      !is.na(Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    ),
    
    prop_native = if_else(
      !is.na(Native_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * Native_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    ),
    
    prop_hawaiian = if_else(
      !is.na(Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    ),
    
    prop_asian = if_else(
      !is.na(Asian_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * Asian_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    ),

    prop_white = if_else(
      !is.na(White_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
      Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 0,
      pmin(100, 100 * White_Students_Public_2023_24 / Total_Students_Public_2023_24),
      NA_real_
    )
  )

# Inspect counts before filtering
total_schools <- nrow(public_school_2324)

schools_le1 <- public_school_2324 %>%
  filter(is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) | Total_Students_Public_2023_24 <= 1) %>%
  nrow()

schools_fullvirtual <- public_school_2324 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Virtual_School_Status_2023_24) &
           str_to_lower(str_trim(Virtual_School_Status_2023_24)) == "fullvirtual") %>%
  nrow()

schools_both <- public_school_2324 %>%
  filter(
    (is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) | Total_Students_Public_2023_24 <= 1) &
      !is.na(Virtual_School_Status_2023_24) &
      str_to_lower(str_trim(Virtual_School_Status_2023_24)) == "fullvirtual"
  ) %>% nrow()

cat("Total schools:", total_schools, "\n")
cat("Schools with <=1 student:", schools_le1, "\n")
cat("Schools FULLVIRTUAL:", schools_fullvirtual, "\n")
cat("Schools with both <=1 student AND FULLVIRTUAL:", schools_both, "\n")

# Filter: remove <=1 student and full virtual schools
public_school_2324 <- public_school_2324 %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Total_Students_Public_2023_24) &
    Total_Students_Public_2023_24 > 1
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.na(Virtual_School_Status_2023_24) |
    str_to_lower(str_trim(Virtual_School_Status_2023_24)) != "fullvirtual"
  )

cat("Schools after filtering:", nrow(public_school_2324), "\n")

# Create urbanicity variable
public_school_2324 <- public_school_2324 %>%
  mutate(
    urbanicity = case_when(
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("11","12","13") ~ "city",
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("21","22","23") ~ "suburban",
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("31","32","33") ~ "town",
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("41","42","43") ~ "rural",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

cat("Schools without urbanicity:", sum(is.na(public_school_2324$urbanicity)), "\n")

# Load CRDC 2021–22 and merge

# school support
public_school_crdc_support_2122 <- read.csv(
  "Data/Schools/Public/2021-22-crdc-data/SCH/School Support.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(COMBOKEY = str_pad(as.character(COMBOKEY), width = 12, side = "left", pad = "0"))

# Helper to sum valid CRDC counts per row
sum_valid_crdc <- function(df, cols) {
  # Convert selected columns to numeric and replace negatives with NA
  mat <- as.matrix(df[cols])
  mat <- apply(mat, 2, function(x) { x <- as.numeric(x); x[x < 0] <- NA; x })
  
  # Row-wise sum, NA if all components invalid
  total <- rowSums(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  total[rowSums(!is.na(mat)) == 0] <- NA
  total
}

# enrollment data (Disability and English Learners)
public_school_crdc_enrollment_2122 <- read.csv(
  "Data/Schools/Public/2021-22-crdc-data/SCH/Enrollment.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    COMBOKEY = str_pad(as.character(COMBOKEY), width = 12, side = "left", pad = "0"),
    SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL = sum_valid_crdc(., c("SCH_ENR_IDEA_F", "SCH_ENR_IDEA_M", "SCH_ENR_IDEA_X")),
    SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL   = sum_valid_crdc(., c("SCH_ENR_EL_F", "SCH_ENR_EL_M", "SCH_ENR_EL_X"))
  ) %>%
  select(COMBOKEY, SCH_ENR_IDEA_F, SCH_ENR_IDEA_M, SCH_ENR_IDEA_X, SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL,
         SCH_ENR_EL_F, SCH_ENR_EL_M, SCH_ENR_EL_X, SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL)

public_school_combined <- public_school_2324 %>%
  left_join(public_school_crdc_support_2122, by = c("School_ID" = "COMBOKEY"))

public_school_combined <- public_school_combined %>%
  left_join(public_school_crdc_enrollment_2122, by = c("School_ID" = "COMBOKEY"))

```

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# Private School Data Cleaning 
# -------------------------------

# Read Geo dataset (2023-24)
private_school_geo <- read.csv(
  "Data/Schools/Private/EDGE_GEOCODE_PRIVATESCH_2324/EDGE_GEOCODE_PRIVATESCH_2324.csv",
  colClasses = c("PPIN" = "character")
) %>%
  mutate(
    PPIN = str_pad(as.character(PPIN), width = 8, side = "left", pad = "0"),
    LAT = as.numeric(LAT),
    LON = as.numeric(LON),
    LOCALE = as.character(LOCALE)  # ensure character for merging
  )

# Read Characteristics dataset (2019-20)
private_school_char <- read.csv(
  "Data/Schools/Private/ELSI_csv_export_6390347040389142352423/ELSI_csv_export_6390347040389142352423.csv",
  skip = 6,
  header = TRUE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Convert numeric columns and PPIN
numeric_cols <- c(
  "Total.Students..Ungraded...PK.12...Private.School..2019.20",
  "Black.or.African.American.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Percentage.of.Black.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Hispanic.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Percentage.of.Hispanic.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "American.Indian.Alaska.Native.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Percentage.of.American.Indian.Alaska.Native.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Nat..Hawaiian.or.Other.Pacific.Isl..Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Percentage.of.Nat..Hawaiian.or.Other.Pacific.Isl..Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Asian.or.Asian.Pacific.Islander.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Percentage.of.Asian.or.Asian.Pacific.Islander.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "White.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Percentage.of.White.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  "Full.Time.Equivalent..FTE..Teachers..Private.School..2019.20"
)

id_col <- "School.ID...NCES.Assigned..Private.School..Latest.available.year"

private_school_char[numeric_cols] <- lapply(private_school_char[numeric_cols], function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))
private_school_char[[id_col]] <- as.character(private_school_char[[id_col]])

# Rename columns to readable names
new_private_names <- c(
  Private_School_Name = "Private.School.Name",
  State_Name_Latest = "State.Name..Private.School..Latest.available.year",
  State_Name_2019_20 = "State.Name..Private.School..2019.20",
  # FIPS_State_Code = "ANSI.FIPS.State.Code..Private.School..Latest.available.year",
  STATE_not_geo_file = "State.Abbr..Private.School..Latest.available.year", 
  Private_School_Name_2019_20 = "Private.School.Name..Private.School..2019.20",
  PPIN = "School.ID...NCES.Assigned..Private.School..Latest.available.year",
  Total_Students_Private_2019_20 = "Total.Students..Ungraded...PK.12...Private.School..2019.20",
  Black_Students_Private_2019_20 = "Black.or.African.American.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20 = "Hispanic.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  Native_Students_Private_2019_20 = "American.Indian.Alaska.Native.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20 = "Nat..Hawaiian.or.Other.Pacific.Isl..Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  Asian_Students_Private_2019_20 = "Asian.or.Asian.Pacific.Islander.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  White_Students_Private_2019_20 = "White.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  prop_black = "Percentage.of.Black.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  prop_hispanic = "Percentage.of.Hispanic.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  prop_native = "Percentage.of.American.Indian.Alaska.Native.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  prop_hawaiian = "Percentage.of.Nat..Hawaiian.or.Other.Pacific.Isl..Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  prop_asian = "Percentage.of.Asian.or.Asian.Pacific.Islander.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  prop_white = "Percentage.of.White.Students..Private.School..2019.20",
  FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20 = "Full.Time.Equivalent..FTE..Teachers..Private.School..2019.20",
  Locale = "Locale..Private.School..2019.20"
)
private_school_char <- private_school_char %>% rename(!!!new_private_names)

private_school_char <- private_school_char %>%
  mutate(
    PPIN = str_pad(as.character(PPIN), width = 8, side = "left", pad = "0"),
    STATE_not_geo_file = str_trim(STATE_not_geo_file),
    State_Name_Latest = str_trim(State_Name_Latest),
    State_Name_2019_20 = str_trim(State_Name_2019_20)
  )

# Cap demographic proportions at 100
private_school_char <- private_school_char %>%
  mutate(across(c(prop_black, prop_hispanic, prop_native, prop_hawaiian, prop_asian, prop_white),
                ~ pmin(100, .)))

# Filter out schools with <=1 student or missing PPIN
private_school_char <- private_school_char %>%
  filter(!is.na(Total_Students_Private_2019_20) & Total_Students_Private_2019_20 > 1,
         !is.na(PPIN) & PPIN != "")

# Simplify locale codes into broader urbanicity categories
private_school_char <- private_school_char %>%
  mutate(
    urbanicity_char_data = case_when(
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("11","12","13") ~ "city",
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("21","22","23") ~ "suburban",
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("31","32","33") ~ "town",
      substr(Locale, 1, 2) %in% c("41","42","43") ~ "rural",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_  # This ensures any other value is marked as NA
    )
  )

# Merge geo and char datasets, preserve all geo schools
private_school_combined <- private_school_geo %>%
  left_join(private_school_char, by = "PPIN") %>%
  # Recreate urbanicity based on LOCALE
  mutate(
    urbanicity_geo_data = case_when(
      substr(LOCALE, 1, 2) %in% c("11","12","13") ~ "city",
      substr(LOCALE, 1, 2) %in% c("21","22","23") ~ "suburban",
      substr(LOCALE, 1, 2) %in% c("31","32","33") ~ "town",
      substr(LOCALE, 1, 2) %in% c("41","42","43") ~ "rural",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

private_school_combined <- private_school_combined %>%
   select(
     Private_School_Name, State_Name_Latest, State_Name_2019_20, STATE_not_geo_file, STATE,
     Private_School_Name_2019_20, PPIN, Total_Students_Private_2019_20,
     Black_Students_Private_2019_20, Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20, Native_Students_Private_2019_20,
     Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20, Asian_Students_Private_2019_20, White_Students_Private_2019_20,
     prop_black, prop_hispanic, prop_native, prop_hawaiian, prop_asian, prop_white,
     FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20, LOCALE, urbanicity_geo_data, LAT, LON
   ) %>%
   mutate(
     STATE = str_trim(STATE),
     State_Name_Latest = str_trim(State_Name_Latest),
     State_Name_2019_20 = str_trim(State_Name_2019_20),
     urbanicity = urbanicity_geo_data
   )

# Inspect coordinates and urbanicity & locale coverage
coord_after_join <- private_school_combined %>%
  summarise(
    has_coordinates = sum(!is.na(LAT) & !is.na(LON)),
    missing_coordinates = sum(is.na(LAT) | is.na(LON)),
    has_state = sum(!is.na(STATE)),
    has_urbanicity = sum(!is.na(urbanicity)),
    has_locale = sum(!is.na(LOCALE))
  )

cat("Schools with coordinates after join:", coord_after_join$has_coordinates, "\n")
cat("Schools missing coordinates after join:", coord_after_join$missing_coordinates, "\n")
cat("Schools with state:", coord_after_join$has_state, "\n")
cat("Schools with urbanicity:", coord_after_join$has_urbanicity, "\n")
cat("Schools with locale:", coord_after_join$has_locale, "\n")

private_school_combined %>% filter(STATE_not_geo_file != STATE) %>% print()
```

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# Data Validation Checks
# -------------------------------

cat("\n===== PUBLIC SCHOOL VALIDATION =====\n")

# 1️⃣ Missing CRDC join
missing_crdc <- public_school_combined %>%
  filter(is.na(SCH_NAME) & !is.na(School_ID)) %>% nrow()
cat("1️⃣ Rows with missing CRDC join:", missing_crdc, "\n")

# 2️⃣ Missing urbanicity
missing_urbanicity <- sum(is.na(public_school_combined$urbanicity))
cat("2️⃣ Rows with missing urbanicity:", missing_urbanicity, "\n")

# 3️⃣ Missing coordinates
cat("3️⃣ Public: Missing Lat/Long =", 
    sum(is.na(public_school_combined$Latitude) | is.na(public_school_combined$Longitude)), "\n")

# 4️⃣ Proportion ranges
cat("4️⃣ Public proportion summaries (min, median, max, NA count):\n")
print(summary(select(public_school_combined, prop_frl, prop_black, prop_hispanic, prop_white)))

# 5️⃣ Duplicate School_IDs
dup_public <- public_school_combined %>% count(School_ID) %>% filter(n > 1) %>% nrow()
cat("5️⃣ Duplicate School_IDs (public):", dup_public, "\n")

# 6️⃣ Missing School_IDs
missing_ids_public <- public_school_combined %>% filter(is.na(School_ID) | School_ID == "") %>% nrow()
cat("6️⃣ Public rows missing School_ID:", missing_ids_public, "\n")

# 7️⃣ Total number of rows/columns
cat("7️⃣ Public dataset shape: Rows =", nrow(public_school_combined),
    "| Columns =", ncol(public_school_combined), "\n")

cat("\n===== PRIVATE SCHOOL VALIDATION =====\n")

# 8️⃣ Missing coordinates after join
missing_geo <- private_school_combined %>% filter(is.na(LAT) | is.na(LON)) %>% nrow()
cat("8️⃣ Private: Missing coordinates after join:", missing_geo, "\n")

# 9️⃣ Proportion ranges, duplicates, and missing PPINs
cat("9️⃣ Private proportion summaries (min, median, max, NA count):\n")
print(summary(select(private_school_combined, prop_black, prop_hispanic, prop_white)))

dup_private <- private_school_combined %>% count(PPIN) %>% filter(n > 1) %>% nrow()
missing_ids_private <- private_school_combined %>% filter(is.na(PPIN) | PPIN == "") %>% nrow()
cat("   Duplicate PPINs (private):", dup_private, "\n")
cat("   Missing PPIN values:", missing_ids_private, "\n")

# Final summary
cat("\nPrivate dataset shape: Rows =", nrow(private_school_combined),
    "| Columns =", ncol(private_school_combined), "\n")
cat("\n===== VALIDATION COMPLETE =====\n")

```

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# Export cleaned datasets
# -------------------------------

write.csv(public_school_combined, 
          "Data/Schools/Public/public_school_combined.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(private_school_combined, 
          "Data/Schools/Private/private_school_combined.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# Brownfields

brownfield_sites = read.csv("Data/Pollution Sites/Brownfield/CIMC Basic Search Result.csv")
brownfield_geo <- read.csv("Data/Pollution Sites/Brownfield/More BF Table.csv")

# Using sub() to remove everything before the ID
brownfield_sites$Brownfield_ID <- sub(".*P31_ID:", "", brownfield_sites$Brownfields.Link.CSV)
brownfield_sites$Registry_ID <- sub(".*p_registry_id=", "", brownfield_sites$FRS.Link.CSV)

brownfield_geo$Brownfield_ID = as.character(brownfield_geo$Property.ID)

# Remove duplicates in site file based on Brownfield ID
brownfield_sites <- brownfield_sites %>%
  distinct(Brownfield_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Remove duplicates in geo file based on Brownfield ID
brownfield_geo <- brownfield_geo %>%
  distinct(Brownfield_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Find matching Brownfield IDs
matching_ids <- intersect(brownfield_sites$Brownfield_ID, brownfield_geo$Brownfield_ID)
# Count how many matches there are
num_matches <- length(matching_ids)
cat("Number of Brownfield IDs present in both files:", num_matches, "\n")

# Join site and geo files
brownfield = left_join(brownfield_sites, brownfield_geo, by = c("Brownfield_ID"))
write.csv(brownfield, "Data/Pollution Sites/Brownfield/brownfield_sites.csv")

```
